raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California is falling short on its housing goals.",
    "Millions of Californians are struggling with housing insecurity.",
    "Assemblymember Alex Lee’s Social Housing Act, AB 11, aims to address the state’s housing shortage and affordability crisis.",
    "AB 11 would establish a state-level social housing developer known as the California Housing Authority.",
    "The median price of a San Jose starter home cost upwards of $970,000 in 2024.",
    "The typical family in San Jose makes roughly $170,000 a year.",
    "Homebuyers in San Jose have to earn nearly $300,000 annually to afford a starter home.",
    "A modest 1-bedroom home in San Jose costs nearly $2,000 a month.",
    "A full-time worker earning minimum wage can only afford a monthly rent of roughly $830.",
    "The population of unhoused people in California rose by 30.5% from 2007 to 2023.",
    "The California Housing Authority would develop social housing that is financially self-sustaining and affordable for all income levels.",
    "Higher income housing units can subsidize low-income units to ensure affordability without reliance on government subsidies.",
    "Social housing, being under public control and oversight, is removed from market forces and speculation.",
    "The social housing bond would provide the California Housing Authority with $950 million in a revolving loan fund.",
    "The bond would give the agency access to zero-interest loans for constructing mixed-income housing.",
    "Montgomery County, Maryland has implemented a revolving loan fund model successfully.",
    "Montgomery County's $100 million revolving loan fund is financing the construction of up to 2,000 mixed-income housing units by 2030.",
    "Social housing has been effective in ending housing shortages across the globe.",
    "Social housing has provided affordable and desirable homes for people of different income levels in Vienna and Singapore."
  ]
}
```
